NOWRUZ DAY 1 — ISRAEL STRIKES TEHRAN ON NOWRUZ: Israel hit Tehran with airstrikes as Iranians marked Persian New Year. Iran launched new wave of Gulf energy attacks: Kuwait Al-Ahmadi refinery fire (KPC confirmed), Saudi shot down 15 drones over Al-Jawf/Eastern regions, Bahrain intercepted 'successive waves,' UAE intercepted 7 missiles + 15 drones. Mojtaba STILL absent — no video/audio since appointment Mar 8. Pezeshkian has NO CONTACT with Mojtaba (IranWire). NCRI: 3 young protesters EXECUTED in Qom on March 19 before Nowruz (19-year-old wrestling champion Saleh Mohammadi + Mehdi Ghasemi + Saeed Davoudi).

BESSENT 140M BARRELS — MAJOR ECONOMIC MOVE: Treasury Secretary Bessent (Fox Business Mar 19): US may 'unsanction the Iranian oil that's on the water — about 140 million barrels.' = 10-14 days supply. 'Using Iranian barrels against Iran to keep price down.' This follows lifting sanctions on 130M barrels Russian oil at sea. Combined with G7 SPR release (400M barrels) + potential further unilateral SPR = aggressive supply-side intervention. OIL DROPPED: Brent from $119 intraday spike (Mar 19) to ~$110 (Mar 20). Bessent: 'not intervening in financial markets, supplying physical markets.'

NETANYAHU CLAIMS — IRAN CAPABILITY DESTROYED: Netanyahu press conference Mar 20: 'Iran can no longer enrich uranium or produce ballistic missiles.' Israel 'helping US open Hormuz.' Agreed to stop attacks on Iranian energy at Trump's request. Called Iran's Hormuz closure 'blackmail that won't work.' IF TRUE: major strategic shift. IF EXAGGERATED: propaganda. IAEA's Grossi contradicts: 'war cannot entirely eliminate nuclear program.' Isfahan underground facility = IAEA never visited. Verification impossible during war.

HOUTHI RESTRAINT — STILL HOLDING DAY 21: Despite expectations, Houthis have NOT entered the war. The National: 'mystery of no Houthi attacks.' AP (Mar 15): stockpiles RUNNING LOW after 2024-2025 Red Sea campaign + Iran supply disrupted. Possible US/Saudi deal. AJ analysis (Mar 7): 'strategic pause — waiting for Iran's coordination.' Israeli 2025 strikes decapitated Sanaa leadership. Fear of Israeli retaliation. Southern secessionist threat. FDD: 'rhetorical solidarity' only. Houthi leader: 'fingers on trigger.' Times Mar 16: awaiting Iranian signal if US weakens Hormuz control.

ISFAHAN UNDERGROUND NUCLEAR — VERIFICATION CRISIS: IAEA confirms NEW enrichment site at underground Isfahan complex — 'never visited.' E3 to IAEA Board: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Iran's FOURTH enrichment plant. 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons. Grossi: 'war cannot entirely eliminate program.' The National: IAEA can't tell if 'operational or empty hall.' Iran stored most HEU at Isfahan tunnel complex. Araghchi offered to dilute (CBS Face the Nation) but attacks continued. Netanyahu claims enrichment capability destroyed — directly contradicts IAEA assessment.

DESERTIONS — DISPUTED BUT REAL AT UNIT LEVEL: Iran International + Militarnyi: Police salary payments DISRUPTED. ~350 police left posts at one base. Some units 90% absence. Retirees unpaid 2 months. IRGC recalling retirees + prisoner amnesty. BUT: Western analysts (WashPost) 'no significant defections.' Algemeiner: Basij commander deserted. Israeli officials: 'isolated' cases. Wikipedia article created on desertions. Pezeshkian-IRGC rift in tense meeting: Pezeshkian warned economic strain, IRGC dismissed concerns. Elite fracture condition 'not met' per analysts — but unit-level degradation undeniable.

LEBANON CONFIRMED 1,000+ KILLED: Lebanese government confirmed 1,000+ killed (NBC Mar 20). 1M+ displaced (19% of population). 700 schools = shelters. Israel planning massive Litani ground invasion (Axios). IDF struck/destroyed Litani bridges. US supports plan but asked to spare infrastructure/airport. Israeli official: 'full US backing.' 85,000-90,000 crossed to Syria. Lebanese govt: direct ceasefire 'immediately.'

OIL CORRECTED D21: Brent ~$110 (Fortune AM $107.40; CNBC $110.28; OilPriceAPI $110.71; range $109-$119). DOWN from D20's $119 intraday spike. Bessent 140M barrels + Netanyahu Hormuz claims = downward pressure. Saudi officials (WSJ): $180/b if disruptions last through late April. Citi: $120+ if continues. IEA: 'largest supply disruption in history — 20 Mb/d offline.' 1,000 tankers stranded at Hormuz (Wikipedia Hormuz crisis). Only trickle through.

HORMUZ — OPERATION MARITIME SHIELD: G7 escort initiative launched Mar 10. Lloyd's: 8-10 destroyers per convoy = 10% of pre-war traffic. 5,000-6,000 Iranian naval mines. US Energy Secretary Wright: escorts possible by end of March. BUT: US Navy told shipping industry 'does not have naval availability.' France: 'purely defensive, purely support' mission. UK sent military planners. Germany, Italy, Luxembourg, Romania, Spain, UK ALL declined military involvement. India: 2 gas tankers negotiated passage. Iran allowing selective transit to China, Turkey, Pakistan, India.

11TH MEU DEPLOYING: US accelerating deployment of 2,200+ Marines from San Diego. Trump: 'not putting troops anywhere' (ground troops). Pentagon: $200B+ supplemental. 7,000+ US targets struck across Iran. Joint Chiefs Caine: attacking deeper into Iranian territory.

HENGAW + CASUALTIES: Hengaw 5th report (D18): 5,300 killed. Extrapolating D21: ~5,600+. HRANA: 3,114 (43% civilian). Health Ministry: 1,444 official + 18,551 injured. CNN tally: 2,200+ across Middle East. Israel: 15 killed (up from 14) + 4 killed in West Bank by Iranian missile strike overnight. 13 US KIA. 70,000+ civilian structures damaged. 3.2M displaced. Internet ~480+ hrs (21st day). 350 Starlink confiscated.

WARTIME EXECUTIONS + PROSECUTION: 3 protesters executed in Qom Mar 19 before Nowruz (NCRI). Protesters detained to June 2027. Security forces banning Nowruz gatherings. Streets 'largely deserted, roamed by paramilitary officials and vigilantes' (CNN). Iranian diaspora: cancelled/scaled back festivities worldwide.

DIPLOMACY: Araghchi offered dilution (CBS Face the Nation). Geneva round 3 failed. Trump instructed Netanyahu to stop energy strikes — Netanyahu agreed. Bessent: 'using Iranian barrels against Iran.' Lebanese govt: direct ceasefire. Haass: 'Open for All or Closed to All.' Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause.

dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.

dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.

dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. 6 salvos at Israel since midnight = maintaining pressure. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali warships destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached. Gabbard contradicts Trump. Kent FBI probe. Saudi FM 'trust shattered.' Pezeshkian resignation crisis. Swedish execution. Pentagon $200B+.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets are being systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones can reach Saudi Arabia's western export infrastructure, not just Gulf-facing facilities. This means pipeline bypass routes (East-West Pipeline to Yanbu) are no longer safe. The energy war has NO geographic limit within Saudi Arabia. Combined with Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = comprehensive assault on Gulf energy architecture.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ DAY 1 — BESSENT 140M BARRELS + NETANYAHU 'IRAN DESTROYED' + TEHRAN STRUCK: Israel hit Tehran on Nowruz. Iran attacked Gulf: Kuwait Al-Ahmadi refinery fire (KPC confirmed), Saudi 15 drones intercepted (Al-Jawf/Eastern), Bahrain 'successive waves' intercepted, UAE 7 missiles + 15 drones intercepted. BESSENT: US may unsanction 140M barrels Iranian oil at sea. NETANYAHU: 'Iran can no longer enrich or produce missiles' — IAEA contradicts. Mojtaba absent since Mar 8 — Pezeshkian NO CONTACT. 3 protesters executed Qom Mar 19. 11th MEU (2,200 Marines) deploying. Lebanon confirmed 1,000+.
dailyRows.capability: D21: 40+72. NETANYAHU claims Iran ballistic/enrichment capability destroyed — directly contradicted by ongoing launches AND IAEA assessment. Iran still launching daily: Kuwait refinery fire proves continued operational capacity. IRGC desertions real at unit level (90% police absence, salary crisis) but disputed by Western analysts at institutional level. 7,000+ US targets struck. Joint Chiefs: 'attacking deeper.' BUT: autonomous IRGC units continue executing target list (4/7 hit). Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.
dailyRows.cost: Brent DROPPED ~$110 (from $119 intraday D20). BESSENT intervention: 140M barrels Iranian + 130M barrels Russian oil unsanctioned. G7 SPR 400M barrels. Saudi officials (WSJ): $180/b if disruptions last through April. 1,000 tankers stranded at Hormuz. Operation Maritime Shield G7 launched — but US Navy 'does not have naval availability.' Multiple EU states DECLINED military involvement. Israel 15 killed (up from 14) + 4 West Bank. 13 US KIA. 11th MEU deploying. Pentagon $200B+ supplemental. CNN: 2,200+ killed across Middle East. 3 executions before Nowruz. Iranian diaspora: cancelled festivities.
dailyRows.assessment: D21 — NOWRUZ INFLECTION + SUPPLY-SIDE WAR BEGINS: (1) BESSENT 140M BARRELS = most aggressive supply-side intervention of war. Using Iranian oil against Iran. Combined with Russian oil + SPR = massive supply injection. Oil dropped $110 from $119. (2) NETANYAHU 'CAPABILITY DESTROYED' = strategic messaging. IAEA contradicts on nuclear. Ongoing launches contradict on missiles. (3) MOJTABA: absent since Mar 8, Pezeshkian has NO CONTACT = governance vacuum confirmed. (4) HOUTHIS: still out Day 21 = Red Sea open = partial containment holding. (5) 3 EXECUTIONS before Nowruz = regime using maximum repression. (6) 11th MEU deploying = US reinforcing despite Trump 'no troops' claim. The war is shifting from purely military to ECONOMIC WARFARE: Bessent weaponizing oil supply, Netanyahu claiming victory to create political off-ramp, IRGC still fighting but fracturing. Two wars: military (continuing) and economic/narrative (intensifying).

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–20)
timeline.body: IRGC FRACTURING + HOUTHIS OUT + BESSENT OIL INTERVENTION + NETANYAHU 'VICTORY': Nowruz Day 1 — Tehran struck on Persian New Year. Mojtaba absent since Mar 8. BESSENT: 140M barrels Iranian oil may be unsanctioned = supply-side war begins. Netanyahu: 'Iran can no longer enrich or produce missiles' — IAEA contradicts. Houthis STILL out (21 days). Isfahan underground nuclear = IAEA 'never visited.' IRGC desertions real but disputed. Oil $107→$119→$110. 1,000 tankers stranded. 3 executions before Nowruz. Lebanon confirmed 1,000+. 11th MEU deploying. Target scorecard 4/7.

timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets = critical: Jubail (world's largest industrial city), Mesaieed (Qatar petrochemicals), Al Hosn (UAE gas). If struck: Brent $130+, Saudi military entry triggered, total Gulf shutdown. POST-NOWRUZ PROTESTS = key variable. If Chaharshanbe Suri defiance escalates: IRGC faces two-front crisis. Mojtaba's continued absence = succession unresolved. Ukrainian anti-drone deployment: does it shift Gulf defense balance? Selective Hormuz passage: does it evolve into formal framework or collapse? Congress $200B+ supplemental fight.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC target execution vs improved Gulf defenses (Ukrainian experts) + Macron moratorium; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Internal — post-Nowruz protest wave + succession crisis + IRGC two-front strain. US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes (China/India corridor) or collapses.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC completes target list: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If post-Nowruz internal pressure sustains: IRGC faces existential two-front challenge. Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. Oman neutrality violated = regional alignment shifts. No clean outcome available.

timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Post-Nowruz protest trajectory. Saudi military entry decision. Mojtaba's condition / succession. Ukrainian anti-drone impact. Selective Hormuz evolution. Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. US missile resupply. Isfahan nuclear. Congress $200B+. Lebanon Litani. Oman neutrality.

scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 36%→34%. Netanyahu claims Iran capability destroyed + Trump ordered energy strike halt = political momentum toward de-escalation framing. Bessent 140M barrels = supply-side war shifting from military to economic. HOUTHI RESTRAINT 21 days = Red Sea open. IRGC fractures continuing. BUT: autonomous IRGC units may still strike remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Isfahan underground = nuclear wild card. IAEA contradicts Netanyahu on enrichment. If nuclear breakout detected OR remaining targets hit: instant re-escalation. Probability decreased because POLITICAL OFF-RAMP emerging (Trump-Netanyahu energy deal + Bessent oil intervention + 'victory' narrative construction).

scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED at 26%. Evidence continues mounting: (1) IRGC fractures prevent decisive Iranian victory but unit-level not institutional. (2) Patriot crisis prevents decisive coalition victory. (3) Houthi restraint = conflict partially contained. (4) Operation Maritime Shield G7 launched but US Navy 'does not have naval availability.' Multiple EU states declined. (5) Isfahan underground = verification impossible. (6) Geneva fails. (7) 1,000 tankers stranded = Hormuz unresolved. (8) 3 executions before Nowruz + security banning gatherings = regime digging in. Mutual degradation continues.

scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED 16%→17%. BESSENT OIL INTERVENTION = new dimension. US weaponizing supply-side economics: 140M barrels Iranian + 130M barrels Russian + 400M G7 SPR. Trump ordered Netanyahu to stop energy strikes — Netanyahu agreed. Lebanon: direct ceasefire 'immediately.' Haass: 'Open for All or Closed to All.' Netanyahu claiming 'victory' = potential face-saving exit. BUT: Iran still launching. IRGC autonomous. Geneva failed. Most likely form: partial maritime corridor + Lebanon ceasefire + declared 'victory' without comprehensive deal.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED 10%→12%. STRONGEST GAINING SCENARIO THIS UPDATE. Netanyahu: 'Iran can no longer enrich or produce missiles' = victory narrative being constructed. Trump ordered energy strike halt = political signal. Bessent: using oil as weapon instead of missiles. $200B+ cost + 13 US KIA = domestic pressure. 11th MEU deploying but Trump: 'not putting troops anywhere.' IRGC fractures at unit level = 'mission accomplished' talking point. IF Netanyahu/Trump can sell 'Iran destroyed' narrative: exit becomes viable. BUT: Hormuz still closed, IRGC still launching, Isfahan underground = unresolved.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC collapse
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 10%→9%. Western analysts continue to assess no high-ranking defections. IRGC adapting: retirees, prisoner amnesty, executions before Nowruz. Mojtaba absent but regime still functioning through IRGC + clerical apparatus. Pezeshkian has no contact with Mojtaba = governance vacuum but NOT collapse. 3 executions = regime still capable of repression. Unit-level degradation real but institutional survival. Post-Nowruz protest trajectory = key variable but security forces banning gatherings preemptively.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. Geneva round 3 failed. Araghchi offered dilution but attacks continued. Selective Hormuz passage for China/India/Turkey/Pakistan = de facto framework without formal deal. Bessent oil intervention = alternative to negotiated solution. Lebanon ceasefire talks = possible partial deal. Comprehensive Iran deal: near-zero.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش ۱۶→۱۷. بسنت ۱۴۰ میلیون = بعد اقتصادی جدید. لبنان مذاکره. ترامپ-نتانیاهو توافق انرژی.

theoryEvaluation.title: BESSENT OIL INTERVENTION — supply-side war begins
theoryEvaluation.body: NEW FRAMEWORK: Treasury Secretary Bessent announced US may unsanction 140M barrels of Iranian oil at sea = 10-14 days supply. Combined with 130M barrels Russian oil already unsanctioned + G7 SPR release (400M barrels) + potential further unilateral SPR = most aggressive supply-side intervention in modern conflict history. Bessent: 'using Iranian barrels against Iran to keep price down. Not intervening in financial markets, supplying physical markets.' This signals a STRATEGIC SHIFT: from military destruction of Iran's capacity to ECONOMIC WEAPONIZATION of global oil supply. If Bessent succeeds in capping oil at ~$100-110: (1) Removes Iran's primary economic leverage (Hormuz closure less impactful if price doesn't spike). (2) Creates breathing room for longer military campaign. (3) Builds domestic political support for continued war (gas prices stabilized). BUT: Saudi officials (WSJ) warn $180/b if disruptions last through late April. 1,000 tankers stranded. SPR finite. And Iran can still attack Gulf production directly. The supply-side war is a race between Bessent's interventions and IRGC target execution.

theoryEvaluation.title: NETANYAHU 'VICTORY' NARRATIVE — political off-ramp or propaganda?
theoryEvaluation.body: Netanyahu press conference Mar 20: 'Iran can no longer enrich uranium or produce ballistic missiles.' Israel 'helping US open Hormuz.' Agreed to stop attacking Iranian energy at Trump's request. ASSESSMENT: This is VICTORY NARRATIVE CONSTRUCTION. (1) IAEA DIRECTLY CONTRADICTS: Isfahan underground 'never visited, can't tell if operational or empty hall.' 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons. Grossi: 'war cannot entirely eliminate program.' (2) Iran STILL LAUNCHING: Kuwait refinery fire on same day as Netanyahu's claim = ballistic claim demonstrably false. (3) Hormuz STILL CLOSED: 1,000 tankers stranded, US Navy 'does not have naval availability.' SIGNIFICANCE: Netanyahu + Trump are constructing political off-ramp. If 'Iran destroyed' narrative gains traction domestically, it creates face-saving exit. Combined with Bessent oil intervention: two-pronged approach (declare victory + stabilize oil) to end war without comprehensive resolution. Risk: premature exit leaves IRGC autonomous units, Isfahan nuclear, Hormuz unresolved.

theoryEvaluation.title: HOUTHI RESTRAINT — still the critical variable (Day 21)
theoryEvaluation.body: 21 days in, Houthis have NOT attacked. Analysis updated: (1) AP: stockpiles low after 2024-2025 campaign. (2) AJ analysis (Mar 7): 'strategic pause, waiting for Iran coordination.' (3) Israeli 2025 strikes decapitated Sanaa leadership = deterrence. (4) Possible US/Saudi deal. (5) Fear of Israeli retaliation. (6) Southern secessionist threat. (7) FDD: 'rhetorical solidarity' only. (8) Times Mar 16: awaiting Iranian signal if US weakens Hormuz. STRATEGIC IMPLICATIONS UNCHANGED: Houthi restraint = Red Sea open = partial containment = war manageable. Houthi entry = both chokepoints = unprecedented global crisis. But NEW FACTOR: Bessent oil intervention reduces ECONOMIC incentive for Houthi entry (if oil already capped, Red Sea closure less impactful). Houthi restraint may be REINFORCED by Bessent strategy.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: بسنت — جنگ عرضه نفت آغاز
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: بسنت: ۱۴۰ میلیون بشکه ایران + ۱۳۰ میلیون روسیه + G7 SPR ۴۰۰ میلیون. 'نفت ایران علیه ایران.' تغییر استراتژیک: نظامی → اقتصادی. نفت ↓ ۱۱۰. عربستان: ۱۸۰ اگر ادامه.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: نتانیاهو 'پیروزی' — خروج سیاسی یا تبلیغات؟
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: نتانیاهو: 'غنی‌سازی/موشک نابود.' IAEA مخالف: اصفهان 'بازدید نکرده.' ایران هنوز شلیک. هرمز بسته. = ساخت روایت پیروزی برای خروج سیاسی. ریسک: خروج زودرس + اصفهان + هرمز حل‌نشده.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: حوثی بیرون — هنوز متغیر کلیدی (روز ۲۱)
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۲۱ روز، حوثی حمله نکرد. AP: ذخایر کم. اسرائیل ۲۰۲۵ صنعا. بسنت نفت = انگیزه اقتصادی حوثی ↓. دریای سرخ باز = مهار جزئی.
